assets.title: Black cat running on the wall
assets.creator: pelican
assets.licenseEvidence: The Flickr source page exposes the CC BY-SA 2.0 license and the official oEmbed endpoint identifies the creator and asset URL.
assets.visualReason: The cat is airborne with strong forward motion and candid blur; it communicates impulsive action before any Tarot symbol is added.
